message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

box "Central-Settlement"
participant "Mojaloop Adapter" as MA #LightBlue
participant "API" as API #LightBlue
participant "api / Handler" as Handler #LightGreen
participant "Application Layer\n(domain / service / facade)" as AppLayer #LightGreen
end box

box "Storage"
participant "TigerBeetle Client" as TBClient #LightBlue
participant "TigerBeetle Cluster" as TBCluster #LightGreen
database "MySQL" as MySQL
end box

note left of MA: Hub operator or\nDFSP interactions
note right of MA: NodeJS interface\ninvokes REST API
note right of Handler: JSON request decoded &\nprocessed via handler
note right of AppLayer: Expose service functions &\nhandle database interactions

group Update Settlement
    [-> MA: 1 //JSON//\n(settlement data)
    MA -> Handler: 2 Invoke handler
    Handler -> AppLayer: 3 Invoke application layer
    AppLayer -> MySQL: 4 Retrieve settlement data\n(excluding accounts)
    MySQL --> AppLayer
    AppLayer -> MySQL: 5 Retrieve accounts for all //Transfers//\nfor a settlement window
    MySQL --> AppLayer
    AppLayer -> MySQL: 6 Update settlement data\n(excluding accounts)
    MySQL --> AppLayer
    AppLayer -> AppLayer: 7 Settlement state\nprocessing
    AppLayer -> TBClient: 8 Invoke account creation based on\nsettlement state of each //Transfer//
    TBClient -> TBCluster: 9 Create settlement accounts\n& return result
    TBCluster --> TBClient
    TBClient --> AppLayer: 10 Return settlement result
    AppLayer -> MySQL: 11 Update final settlement state\n& return result
    MySQL --> AppLayer
    AppLayer --> Handler: 12 Return result
    Handler --> MA: 13 Return result
    [<-- MA: 14 Return result with\n**settlementData**
end

@enduml
```
